# Execution Checklist

## Progress And Files

- [ ] Checked the reading progress file
- [ ] Confirmed conversion strategy: chapter-by-chapter or after finishing the book
- [ ] Extracted heading line numbers
- [ ] Generated chapter ranges and stats
- [ ] Grouped highlights first when there are many highlights
- [ ] Created or updated the progress file
- [ ] Wrote candidate insights into the progress file before calling `ah-card`
- [ ] Wrote the literature note
- [ ] Updated the candidate insight pool
- [ ] Confirmed the user can see the generated files
- [ ] Updated `{{metaPaths.memory}}/STATUS.md` when needed

## Highlight-To-Literature Guidance

- [ ] Assessed each highlight's depth of thinking
- [ ] Reported the assessment to the user
- [ ] Used wake-up questions for highlights with no reflection
- [ ] Used follow-up questions for initial reflections
- [ ] Used confirmation and cleanup for deep reflections
- [ ] Asked at most two follow-up rounds per highlight
- [ ] Respected "skip" immediately
- [ ] Kept the user's own words when summarizing their understanding

## Literature Note Frontmatter

- [ ] Filled created date, type, source, author, status, rating, and tags

## Permanent Note Handoff

- [ ] Followed the selected conversion strategy
- [ ] Called `ah-card` when the user wants card creation
- [ ] Did not handle permanent-note creation inside `ah-read`
